extract: Rest (Japanese: ねむる Rest) is a non-damaging Psychic-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TM44 from Generation I to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, as well as in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM05 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TM21 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM085 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.
